_comment: Example Reference object. Do NOT supply 'id' in csl_data -- any provided id is stripped on ingest so it cannot disagree with the derived id. reference_label is optional (letters, digits, and underscores only; no hyphens); set it to override the surname token, e.g. 'FEMA_P58' for an institutional author or 'Smith_CladdingCyclic' to disambiguate one author's multiple same-year works. Leave it empty to use the first-author surname.
